title: Document

child_sections.title: vision extraction (lmstudio_qwen)
child_sections.summary: This document section (Addendum 1.4) details the budget allocation and expenditure for fiscal year 2013 (Ethiopian calendar) across two programs: Program 1 – Work Management & Administration, and an Investment Policy Study & Research program. It presents allocated budgets versus actual spending in thousands of Birr for both 2012 and 2013, alongside planned targets and achievements (also in thousands of Birr) for Program 1 over a nine-month period and up to the fourth year. Key metrics tracked include investment climate improvements and number of discussion forums held as part of the Investment Policy program.
